description: The design and regulation of land use, transportation, community facilities, and infrastructure. How places are shaped by intention and neglect.

dome_relevance.5: Housing — zoning, density, affordability as planning outcomes
dome_relevance.8: Community — neighborhood design shapes social connection
dome_relevance.9: Environment — land use determines environmental exposure

sphere_relevance.1: Parcel — zoning IS the planning framework
sphere_relevance.2: Infrastructure — utilities, transit, connectivity as planned systems
sphere_relevance.4: Economic — land value, TIF districts, development finance
sphere_relevance.5: Social — demographics and foot traffic shaped by planning decisions
sphere_relevance.7: Activation — what a space becomes is a planning question
